name: RAG Ground Truth Dataset v1
description: 50 query-relevantChunk pairs for evaluating retrieval quality across MCP, vector search, hybrid search, re-ranker, chunking, context window, engine, API, PDF, and tenant isolation scenarios

queries.query: What does MCP stand for in the Model Context Protocol?
How does JSON-RPC fit into the MCP protocol?
What transports does MCP support for communication?
How are MCP tools discovered and invoked by the client?
What is the difference between MCP resources and tools?
How does vector search find semantically similar documents?
What similarity metrics are used in vector search?
How do embedding dimensions affect vector search performance?
What is the role of an index in vector search?
How does $vectorSearch work in MongoDB Atlas?
When should hybrid search be used instead of pure vector search?
How are vector and keyword scores combined in hybrid search?
What is min-max normalization in the context of hybrid search?
What weight is typically assigned to vector vs keyword scores?
How does Atlas Search $search differ from MongoDB $text?
What is a cross-encoder re-ranker and how does it work?
When does reranking improve retrieval quality the most?
How does Cohere's rerank API work?
What is the latency cost of adding a reranking step?
How are re-ranker results cached to avoid redundant API calls?
What chunking strategies are available for document processing?
How does semantic chunking detect topic boundaries?
What chunk size is recommended for retrieval-augmented generation?
How does chunk overlap prevent information loss at boundaries?
What is PDF-aware chunking and when should it be used?
How is the token budget split across context sections?
What happens when retrieved chunks exceed the token budget?
How are chunk citations formatted in the assembled context?
How does the sliding window work for conversation history?
Are system instructions guaranteed space in the context window?
What steps does the RAG engine pipeline execute?
How does the engine handle errors in non-critical pipeline steps?
What metadata does the pipeline tracer capture?
How is the query normalized before entering the pipeline?
What does the RAGResult type contain?
What is the POST /api/rag/query endpoint for?
How does authentication work for the RAG API routes?
What happens when a workspace ID mismatch is detected?
How do you check the indexing status of a document?
How do you trigger re-indexing for a document?
How does the PDF upload flow work end-to-end?
What happens after a PDF is uploaded to the system?
How does OCR help with scanned PDF documents?
What metadata is extracted from PDF documents?
How are tables extracted from PDF files?
How is tenant isolation enforced in the RAG system?
What happens if a cross-tenant query is attempted?
How does workspace ID scoping prevent data leaks?
Is tenant isolation enforced at the database level too?
How does the retrieval cache respect tenant boundaries?
